title: Amtech S4600 4-Way Plumbing Key, Multi-Functional Utility Key, Radiator Key, Tap Key, Unlocks Electric, Gas and Water Meter Boxes
features: MULTI-PURPOSE: With a protective black finish, this versatile 4-way plumbing key has small square, large square, triangle and offset key ends
VERSATILE: It can be used for gas meters, electric meter cupboards, stop cocks, outside taps and radiators
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 4 Way Plumbing Key See more
